parameters.content:
## Watchlist sync
Keeps the `watchlist` table in step with the **Second Brain - In Scope** security group.

**Group id:** ac1d9b72-d7a0-4b1b-a777-3a64e81b873d

**Needs:** the app must have `GroupMember.Read.All` (Application) consented, and the same **MS Graph** OAuth2 credential the Watcher uses (client-credentials grant).

Members in the group -> active. Anyone removed from the group -> active=false (Watcher stops polling them). Runs every 6h + Run now.

Note: single page (top 999). If the group ever exceeds 999 members, add @odata.nextLink paging.
